# Phase 21: Virtual Documents - Context

**Gathered:** 2026-04-06

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

Users can compose compound documents from multiple children in a defined order and generate a merged PDF output. Users can create virtual documents, add/reorder/remove children, system detects circular references, and merged PDF can be generated from all children.

</domain>
